type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in the fugitive emissions was due to high construction activity at the site including a major earth works project involving cell construction.  The increase in the NPRI road dust was based on a revised truck weight increase due to new waste c

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in fugitive emissions was due to major earth works at the Site in 2009 (landfill cell construction).  The increase in NPRI road dust is due to heavier waste collection trucks that goes into the calculation of particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in fugitive emissions was due to increased earth works at the Site required to construct a new landfill cell and the increase in NRPI road dust was attributed to heavier waste collection trucks.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in fugitive releases are due to more equipment needed during capping activities.  The decrease in NPRI road dust generated were less trips over a shorter distance, thus generating less road dust.  The decrease in point releases are due to low

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in fugitive emissions is due to an increase in construction activities.  The decrease in NPRI road dust is due to less truck traffic and a shorter haul distance.  The decrease in the stack releases are due to the decrease in flare operations

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in point releases are due to decreased operation of the flare in 2008.  The decrease in NPRI road dust is due to a decrease in truck traffic and travel distance and the increase in fugitive releases are due to a slight increase in contruction

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The fugitive releases may have been underestimated in the previous reporting years as staff have confirmed higher daily usage of tipping face equipment at the landfill

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Staff have confirmed that the daily tipping face equipment movement was a lot higher than previously estimated which increased the fugitive emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Staff have confirmed an increase in the daily tipping face usage which has resulted in a higher fugivite emissions being reported

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The decrease in fugitive releases are due to less construction activity at the Site in 2007 versus 2006.  The increase in point releases are due to increased capture of methane that could not be sold off-site resulting in increased operation of the flare.
